---
name: claude-devfleet
description: Orchestrate multi-agent coding tasks via Claude DevFleet вҖ” plan projects, dispatch parallel agents in isolated worktrees, monitor progress, and read structured reports.
origin: community
---
entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: claude-devfleet
description: йҖҡиҝҮClaude DevFleetеҚҸи°ғеӨҡжҷәиғҪдҪ“зј–з Ғд»»еҠЎвҖ”вҖ”и§„еҲ’йЎ№зӣ®гҖҒеңЁйҡ”зҰ»зҡ„е·ҘдҪңж ‘дёӯе№¶иЎҢи°ғеәҰжҷәиғҪдҪ“гҖҒзӣ‘жҺ§иҝӣеәҰе№¶иҜ»еҸ–з»“жһ„еҢ–жҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ
origin: community
---

entries.en-US: # Claude DevFleet Multi-Agent Orchestration
entries.zh-Hans: # Claude DevFleet еӨҡжҷәиғҪдҪ“зј–жҺ’

entries.en-US: ## When to Use
entries.zh-Hans: ## дҪҝз”Ёж—¶жңә

entries.en-US: Use this skill when you need to dispatch multiple Claude Code agents to work on coding tasks in parallel. Each agent runs in an isolated git worktree with full tooling.
entries.zh-Hans: еҪ“йңҖиҰҒи°ғеәҰеӨҡдёӘ Claude Code жҷәиғҪдҪ“е№¶иЎҢеӨ„зҗҶзј–з Ғд»»еҠЎж—¶дҪҝз”ЁжӯӨжҠҖиғҪгҖӮжҜҸдёӘжҷәиғҪдҪ“еңЁзӢ¬з«Ӣзҡ„ git worktree дёӯиҝҗиЎҢпјҢе№¶й…ҚеӨҮе…ЁеҘ—е·Ҙе…·гҖӮ

entries.en-US: Requires a running Claude DevFleet instance connected via MCP:
entries.zh-Hans: йңҖиҰҒиҝһжҺҘдёҖдёӘйҖҡиҝҮ MCP иҝҗиЎҢзҡ„ Claude DevFleet е®һдҫӢпјҡ

entries.en-US:
```bash
claude mcp add devfleet --transport http http://localhost:18801/mcp
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
claude mcp add devfleet --transport http http://localhost:18801/mcp
```

entries.en-US: ## How It Works
entries.zh-Hans: ## е·ҘдҪңеҺҹзҗҶ

entries.en-US:
```
User вҶ’ "Build a REST API with auth and tests"
  вҶ“
plan_project(prompt) вҶ’ project_id + mission DAG
  вҶ“
Show plan to user вҶ’ get approval
  вҶ“
dispatch_mission(M1) вҶ’ Agent 1 spawns in worktree
  вҶ“
M1 completes вҶ’ auto-merge вҶ’ auto-dispatch M2 (depends_on M1)
  вҶ“
M2 completes вҶ’ auto-merge
  вҶ“
get_report(M2) вҶ’ files_changed, what_done, errors, next_steps
  вҶ“
Report back to user
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```
з”ЁжҲ· вҶ’ "жһ„е»әдёҖдёӘеёҰжңүиә«д»ҪйӘҢиҜҒе’ҢжөӢиҜ•зҡ„ REST API"
  вҶ“
plan_project(prompt) вҶ’ йЎ№зӣ®ID + д»»еҠЎDAG
  вҶ“
еҗ‘з”ЁжҲ·еұ•зӨәи®ЎеҲ’ вҶ’ иҺ·еҸ–жү№еҮҶ
  вҶ“
dispatch_mission(M1) вҶ’ д»ЈзҗҶ1еңЁе·ҘдҪңж ‘дёӯз”ҹжҲҗ
  вҶ“
M1е®ҢжҲҗ вҶ’ иҮӘеҠЁеҗҲе№¶ вҶ’ иҮӘеҠЁеҲҶеҸ‘M2 (дҫқиө–дәҺM1)
  вҶ“
M2е®ҢжҲҗ вҶ’ иҮӘеҠЁеҗҲе№¶
  вҶ“
get_report(M2) вҶ’ жӣҙж”№зҡ„ж–Үд»¶гҖҒе®ҢжҲҗзҡ„е·ҘдҪңгҖҒй”ҷиҜҜгҖҒеҗҺз»ӯжӯҘйӘӨ
  вҶ“
еҗ‘з”ЁжҲ·жҠҘе‘Ҡ
```

entries.en-US: ### Tools

| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `plan_project(prompt)` | AI breaks a description into a project with chained missions |
| `create_project(name, path?, description?)` | Create a project manually, returns `project_id` |
| `create_mission(project_id, title, prompt, depends_on?, auto_dispatch?)` | Add a mission. `depends_on` is a list of mission ID strings (e.g., `["abc-123"]`). Set `auto_dispatch=true` to auto-start when deps are met. |
| `dispatch_mission(mission_id, model?, max_turns?)` | Start an agent on a mission |
| `cancel_mission(mission_id)` | Stop a running agent |
| `wait_for_mission(mission_id, timeout_seconds?)` | Block until a mission completes (see note below) |
| `get_mission_status(mission_id)` | Check mission progress without blocking |
| `get_report(mission_id)` | Read structured report (files changed, tested, errors, next steps) |
| `get_dashboard()` | System overview: running agents, stats, recent activity |
| `list_projects()` | Browse all projects |
| `list_missions(project_id, status?)` | List missions in a project |
entries.zh-Hans:
| е·Ҙе…· | з”ЁйҖ” |
|------|---------|
| `plan_project(prompt)` | AI е°ҶжҸҸиҝ°еҲҶи§ЈдёәеҢ…еҗ«й“ҫејҸд»»еҠЎзҡ„йЎ№зӣ® |
| `create_project(name, path?, description?)` | жүӢеҠЁеҲӣе»әйЎ№зӣ®пјҢиҝ”еӣһ `project_id` |
| `create_mission(project_id, title, prompt, depends_on?, auto_dispatch?)` | ж·»еҠ д»»еҠЎгҖӮ`depends_on` жҳҜд»»еҠЎ ID еӯ—з¬ҰдёІеҲ—иЎЁпјҲдҫӢеҰӮ `["abc-123"]`пјүгҖӮи®ҫзҪ® `auto_dispatch=true` еҸҜеңЁдҫқиө–ж»Ўи¶іж—¶иҮӘеҠЁеҗҜеҠЁгҖӮ |
| `dispatch_mission(mission_id, model?, max_turns?)` | еҗҜеҠЁжҷәиғҪдҪ“жү§иЎҢд»»еҠЎ |
| `cancel_mission(mission_id)` | еҒңжӯўжӯЈеңЁиҝҗиЎҢзҡ„жҷәиғҪдҪ“ |
| `wait_for_mission(mission_id, timeout_seconds?)` | йҳ»еЎһзӣҙеҲ°д»»еҠЎе®ҢжҲҗпјҲи§ҒдёӢж–№иҜҙжҳҺпјү |
| `get_mission_status(mission_id)` | жЈҖжҹҘд»»еҠЎиҝӣеәҰиҖҢдёҚйҳ»еЎһ |
| `get_report(mission_id)` | иҜ»еҸ–з»“жһ„еҢ–жҠҘе‘ҠпјҲжӣҙж”№зҡ„ж–Үд»¶гҖҒжөӢиҜ•жғ…еҶөгҖҒй”ҷиҜҜгҖҒеҗҺз»ӯжӯҘйӘӨпјү |
| `get_dashboard()` | зі»з»ҹжҰӮи§ҲпјҡиҝҗиЎҢдёӯзҡ„жҷәиғҪдҪ“гҖҒз»ҹи®ЎдҝЎжҒҜгҖҒиҝ‘жңҹжҙ»еҠЁ |
| `list_projects()` | жөҸи§ҲжүҖжңүйЎ№зӣ® |
| `list_missions(project_id, status?)` | еҲ—еҮәйЎ№зӣ®дёӯзҡ„д»»еҠЎ |

entries.en-US: > **Note on `wait_for_mission`:** This blocks the conversation for up to `timeout_seconds` (default 600). For long-running missions, prefer polling with `get_mission_status` every 30вҖ“60 seconds instead, so the user sees progress updates.
entries.zh-Hans: > **е…ідәҺ `wait_for_mission` зҡ„иҜҙжҳҺпјҡ** жӯӨж“ҚдҪңдјҡйҳ»еЎһеҜ№иҜқпјҢжңҖй•ҝ `timeout_seconds` з§’пјҲй»ҳи®Ө 600 з§’пјүгҖӮеҜ№дәҺй•ҝж—¶й—ҙиҝҗиЎҢзҡ„д»»еҠЎпјҢе»әи®®ж”№дёәжҜҸ 30-60 з§’дҪҝз”Ё `get_mission_status` иҪ®иҜўпјҢд»Ҙдҫҝз”ЁжҲ·иғҪзңӢеҲ°иҝӣеәҰжӣҙж–°гҖӮ

entries.en-US: ### Workflow: Plan вҶ’ Dispatch вҶ’ Monitor вҶ’ Report
entries.zh-Hans: ### е·ҘдҪңжөҒпјҡи§„еҲ’ вҶ’ и°ғеәҰ вҶ’ зӣ‘жҺ§ вҶ’ жҠҘе‘Ҡ

entries.en-US:
1. **Plan**: Call `plan_project(prompt="...")` вҶ’ returns `project_id` + list of missions with `depends_on` chains and `auto_dispatch=true`.
2. **Show plan**: Present mission titles, types, and dependency chain to the user.
3. **Dispatch**: Call `dispatch_mission(mission_id=<first_mission_id>)` on the root mission (empty `depends_on`). Remaining missions auto-dispatch as their dependencies complete (because `plan_project` sets `auto_dispatch=true` on them).
4. **Monitor**: Call `get_mission_status(mission_id=...)` or `get_dashboard()` to check progress.
5. **Report**: Call `get_report(mission_id=...)` when missions complete. Share highlights with the user.
entries.zh-Hans:
1. **и§„еҲ’**пјҡи°ғз”Ё `plan_project(prompt="...")` вҶ’ иҝ”еӣһ `project_id` д»ҘеҸҠеёҰжңү `depends_on` й“ҫе’Ң `auto_dispatch=true` зҡ„д»»еҠЎеҲ—иЎЁгҖӮ
2. **еұ•зӨәи®ЎеҲ’**пјҡеҗ‘з”ЁжҲ·е‘ҲзҺ°д»»еҠЎж ҮйўҳгҖҒзұ»еһӢе’Ңдҫқиө–й“ҫгҖӮ
3. **и°ғеәҰ**пјҡеҜ№ж №д»»еҠЎпјҲ`depends_on` дёәз©әпјүи°ғз”Ё `dispatch_mission(mission_id=<first_mission_id>)`гҖӮеү©дҪҷд»»еҠЎеңЁе…¶дҫқиө–йЎ№е®ҢжҲҗж—¶иҮӘеҠЁи°ғеәҰпјҲеӣ дёә `plan_project` дёәе®ғд»¬и®ҫзҪ®дәҶ `auto_dispatch=true`пјүгҖӮ
4. **зӣ‘жҺ§**пјҡи°ғз”Ё `get_mission_status(mission_id=...)` жҲ– `get_dashboard()` жЈҖжҹҘиҝӣеәҰгҖӮ
5. **жҠҘе‘Ҡ**пјҡд»»еҠЎе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺи°ғз”Ё `get_report(mission_id=...)`гҖӮдёҺз”ЁжҲ·еҲҶдә«дә®зӮ№гҖӮ

entries.en-US: ### Concurrency
entries.zh-Hans: ### е№¶еҸ‘жҖ§

entries.en-US: DevFleet runs up to 3 concurrent agents by default (configurable via `DEVFLEET_MAX_AGENTS`). When all slots are full, missions with `auto_dispatch=true` queue in the mission watcher and dispatch automatically as slots free up. Check `get_dashboard()` for current slot usage.
entries.zh-Hans: DevFleet й»ҳи®ӨжңҖеӨҡеҗҢж—¶иҝҗиЎҢ 3 дёӘжҷәиғҪдҪ“пјҲеҸҜйҖҡиҝҮ `DEVFLEET_MAX_AGENTS` й…ҚзҪ®пјүгҖӮеҪ“жүҖжңүж§ҪдҪҚйғҪеҚ ж»Ўж—¶пјҢи®ҫзҪ®дәҶ `auto_dispatch=true` зҡ„д»»еҠЎдјҡеңЁд»»еҠЎзӣ‘и§ҶеҷЁдёӯжҺ’йҳҹпјҢе№¶еңЁж§ҪдҪҚз©әй—Іж—¶иҮӘеҠЁи°ғеәҰгҖӮжЈҖжҹҘ `get_dashboard()` дәҶи§ЈеҪ“еүҚж§ҪдҪҚдҪҝз”Ёжғ…еҶөгҖӮ

entries.en-US: ## Examples
entries.zh-Hans: ## зӨәдҫӢ

entries.en-US: ### Full auto: plan and launch
entries.zh-Hans: ### е…ЁиҮӘеҠЁпјҡи§„еҲ’е№¶еҗҜеҠЁ

entries.en-US:
1. `plan_project(prompt="...")` вҶ’ shows plan with missions and dependencies.
2. Dispatch the first mission (the one with empty `depends_on`).
3. Remaining missions auto-dispatch as dependencies resolve (they have `auto_dispatch=true`).
4. Report back with project ID and mission count so the user knows what was launched.
5. Poll with `get_mission_status` or `get_dashboard()` periodically until all missions reach a terminal state (`completed`, `failed`, or `cancelled`).
6. `get_report(mission_id=...)` for each terminal mission вҖ” summarize successes and call out failures with errors and next steps.
entries.zh-Hans:
1. `plan_project(prompt="...")` вҶ’ жҳҫзӨәеҢ…еҗ«д»»еҠЎе’Ңдҫқиө–е…ізі»зҡ„и®ЎеҲ’гҖӮ
2. и°ғеәҰз¬¬дёҖдёӘд»»еҠЎпјҲ`depends_on` дёәз©әзҡ„йӮЈдёӘпјүгҖӮ
3. еү©дҪҷд»»еҠЎеңЁдҫқиө–е…ізі»и§ЈеҶіж—¶иҮӘеҠЁи°ғеәҰпјҲе®ғд»¬е…·жңү `auto_dispatch=true`пјүгҖӮ
4. жҠҘе‘ҠйЎ№зӣ® ID е’Ңд»»еҠЎж•°йҮҸпјҢи®©з”ЁжҲ·зҹҘйҒ“еҗҜеҠЁдәҶе“ӘдәӣеҶ…е®№гҖӮ
5. е®ҡжңҹдҪҝз”Ё `get_mission_status` жҲ– `get_dashboard()` иҪ®иҜўпјҢзӣҙеҲ°жүҖжңүд»»еҠЎиҫҫеҲ°з»ҲжӯўзҠ¶жҖҒпјҲ`completed`гҖҒ`failed` жҲ– `cancelled`пјүгҖӮ
6. еҜ№жҜҸдёӘз»Ҳжӯўд»»еҠЎжү§иЎҢ `get_report(mission_id=...)`вҖ”вҖ”жҖ»з»“жҲҗеҠҹд№ӢеӨ„пјҢе№¶жҢҮеҮәеӨұиҙҘд»»еҠЎеҸҠе…¶й”ҷиҜҜе’ҢеҗҺз»ӯжӯҘйӘӨгҖӮ

entries.en-US: ### Manual: step-by-step control
entries.zh-Hans: ### жүӢеҠЁпјҡйҖҗжӯҘжҺ§еҲ¶

entries.en-US:
1. `create_project(name="My Project")` вҶ’ returns `project_id`.
2. `create_mission(project_id=project_id, title="...", prompt="...", auto_dispatch=true)` for the first (root) mission вҶ’ capture `root_mission_id`.
   `create_mission(project_id=project_id, title="...", prompt="...", auto_dispatch=true, depends_on=["<root_mission_id>"])` for each subsequent task.
3. `dispatch_mission(mission_id=...)` on the first mission to start the chain.
4. `get_report(mission_id=...)` when done.
entries.zh-Hans:
1. `create_project(name="My Project")` вҶ’ иҝ”еӣһ `project_id`гҖӮ
2. дёәз¬¬дёҖдёӘпјҲж №пјүд»»еҠЎжү§иЎҢ `create_mission(project_id=project_id, title="...", prompt="...", auto_dispatch=true)` вҶ’ жҚ•иҺ· `root_mission_id`гҖӮ
   дёәжҜҸдёӘеҗҺз»ӯд»»еҠЎжү§иЎҢ `create_mission(project_id=project_id, title="...", prompt="...", auto_dispatch=true, depends_on=["<root_mission_id>"])`гҖӮ
3. еңЁз¬¬дёҖдёӘд»»еҠЎдёҠжү§иЎҢ `dispatch_mission(mission_id=...)` д»ҘеҗҜеҠЁй“ҫгҖӮ
4. е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺжү§иЎҢ `get_report(mission_id=...)`гҖӮ

entries.en-US: ### Sequential with review
entries.zh-Hans: ### еёҰе®ЎжҹҘзҡ„дёІиЎҢжү§иЎҢ

entries.en-US:
1. `create_project(name="...")` вҶ’ get `project_id`.
2. `create_mission(project_id=project_id, title="Implement feature", prompt="...")` вҶ’ get `impl_mission_id`.
3. `dispatch_mission(mission_id=impl_mission_id)`, then poll with `get_mission_status` until complete.
4. `get_report(mission_id=impl_mission_id)` to review results.
5. `create_mission(project_id=project_id, title="Review", prompt="...", depends_on=[impl_mission_id], auto_dispatch=true)` вҖ” auto-starts since the dependency is already met.
entries.zh-Hans:
1. `create_project(name="...")` вҶ’ иҺ·еҸ– `project_id`гҖӮ
2. `create_mission(project_id=project_id, title="Implement feature", prompt="...")` вҶ’ иҺ·еҸ– `impl_mission_id`гҖӮ
3. `dispatch_mission(mission_id=impl_mission_id)`пјҢз„¶еҗҺдҪҝз”Ё `get_mission_status` иҪ®иҜўзӣҙеҲ°е®ҢжҲҗгҖӮ
4. `get_report(mission_id=impl_mission_id)` д»Ҙе®ЎжҹҘз»“жһңгҖӮ
5. `create_mission(project_id=project_id, title="Review", prompt="...", depends_on=[impl_mission_id], auto_dispatch=true)` вҖ”вҖ” з”ұдәҺдҫқиө–е·Іж»Ўи¶іпјҢиҮӘеҠЁеҗҜеҠЁгҖӮ

entries.en-US: ## Guidelines
entries.zh-Hans: ## жҢҮеҚ—

entries.en-US:
- Always confirm the plan with the user before dispatching, unless they said to go ahead.
- Include mission titles and IDs when reporting status.
- If a mission fails, read its report before retrying.
- Check `get_dashboard()` for agent slot availability before bulk dispatching.
- Mission dependencies form a DAG вҖ” do not create circular dependencies.
- Each agent runs in an isolated git worktree and auto-merges on completion. If a merge conflict occurs, the changes remain on the agent's worktree branch for manual resolution.
- When manually creating missions, always set `auto_dispatch=true` if you want them to trigger automatically when dependencies complete. Without this flag, missions stay in `draft` status.
entries.zh-Hans:
* еңЁи°ғеәҰеүҚе§Ӣз»ҲдёҺз”ЁжҲ·зЎ®и®Өи®ЎеҲ’пјҢйҷӨйқһз”ЁжҲ·е·ІжҳҺзЎ®жҢҮзӨәз»§з»ӯгҖӮ
* жҠҘе‘ҠзҠ¶жҖҒж—¶еҢ…еҗ«д»»еҠЎж Үйўҳе’Ң IDгҖӮ
* еҰӮжһңд»»еҠЎеӨұиҙҘпјҢеңЁйҮҚиҜ•еүҚиҜ»еҸ–е…¶жҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ
* жү№йҮҸи°ғеәҰеүҚжЈҖжҹҘ `get_dashboard()` дәҶи§ЈжҷәиғҪдҪ“ж§ҪдҪҚеҸҜз”ЁжҖ§гҖӮ
* д»»еҠЎдҫқиө–е…ізі»жһ„жҲҗдёҖдёӘжңүеҗ‘ж— зҺҜеӣҫпјҲDAGпјүвҖ”вҖ”дёҚиҰҒеҲӣе»әеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–гҖӮ
* жҜҸдёӘжҷәиғҪдҪ“еңЁзӢ¬з«Ӣзҡ„ git worktree дёӯиҝҗиЎҢпјҢе№¶еңЁе®ҢжҲҗж—¶иҮӘеҠЁеҗҲе№¶гҖӮеҰӮжһңеҸ‘з”ҹеҗҲе№¶еҶІзӘҒпјҢжӣҙж”№е°Ҷдҝқз•ҷеңЁжҷәиғҪдҪ“зҡ„ worktree еҲҶж”ҜдёҠпјҢд»ҘдҫҝжүӢеҠЁи§ЈеҶігҖӮ
* жүӢеҠЁеҲӣе»әд»»еҠЎж—¶пјҢеҰӮжһңеёҢжңӣе®ғд»¬еңЁдҫқиө–йЎ№е®ҢжҲҗж—¶иҮӘеҠЁи§ҰеҸ‘пјҢиҜ·е§Ӣз»Ҳи®ҫзҪ® `auto_dispatch=true`гҖӮжІЎжңүжӯӨж Үеҝ—пјҢд»»еҠЎе°ҶдҝқжҢҒ `draft` зҠ¶жҖҒгҖӮ
